open_positions.name: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc.
open_positions.thesis: no mechanism. Catalyst: Same-day 8-K (Reg FD + other events) — likely clinical data or partnership disclosure. Falsified by: n/a.
open_positions.latest_reasoning: Entered 0 days ago on same-day 8-K with Reg FD + 8.01 items (RATIONAL conf 3). Stock up 13.63% on 2.34x volume. Thesis was correct: 8-K combination is a high-signal pattern for clinical/partnership disclosure in biotech; market verdict and peer sympathy (BEAM, CRSP holding) confirm positive news interpretation. Exhibit not yet read but execution + volume + peer behavior all validate the entry thesis. Horizon is 'days' and we are one day in; binary outcome still crystallizing. Hold to see if the catalyst (clinical data/partnership detail) drives further repricing or if sympathy bids fade.

open_positions.name: Alaska Air Group, Inc.
open_positions.thesis: no mechanism. Catalyst: Trump's claim of Iran deal 'subject to finalization' → oil lower → airline fuel relief. Falsified by: n/a.
open_positions.latest_reasoning: Entered 0 days ago on UNDERDONE (conf 3, days horizon) airline fuel relief from Iran deal on oil down ~2%. Stock up 11.95% on 1.18x volume, consistent with the thesis mechanism. Entry thesis: if Iran deal finalizes in 'next few days' as Trump claimed, oil leg-down extends and ALK's fuel cost tailwind compounds. Position is +11.95% but unrealized is slightly negative (-1.94%) because flagged near open/at inflated levels. Horizon is days; catalyst (deal closing or oil trajectory) is still in motion. Trump framing said 'coming days,' so next 2-5 sessions are critical. Hold to see if crude continues lower and deal materializes. If oil reverses or deal fails, thesis breaks and we exit. For now, tape and direction support the thesis.
open_positions.catalyst: Trump's claim of Iran deal 'subject to finalization' → oil lower → airline fuel relief

closed_positions.name: Acuity Inc.
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: Entered 6 days ago on OVERDONE (conf 3, weeks horizon) sympathy with industrials on CPI/Iran headlines. Today's flag pool re-flags AYI with identical thesis and same setup (XLI down, no 8-K). The problem: thesis horizon was 'weeks' but we are now six days in and the move is NEGATIVE (-6.5% today, -10.37% over 5 days). Entry thesis was that sympathy was OVERDONE and would fade; instead the sector/name is DOWN further and deteriorating. This is evidence the thesis was either wrong or that the 'sympathy fade' has not materialized and instead became real weakness. Either way, the original conviction to hold on a WEEKS horizon is broken because the direction has reversed. No 8-K has appeared (which was a confirm signal for thesis integrity). Selling to redeploy.

closed_positions.name: Masimo Corporation
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: 8-K (Item 2.01 + 3.01 + 5.01 + 5.03 bundle) confirms closing of Sound United divestiture—the specific catalyst flagged at entry. Stock appropriately flat on 3.17x volume, indicating market view matches prior expectations. Horizon was 'days,' and the event has now crystallized. Unrealized loss is -0.12%, immaterial, but thesis has fully resolved and there is no forward catalyst in the flag summary. Selling to redeploy capital to higher-conviction opportunities (NTLA binary, AEIS semi-cap tailwind).

closed_positions.name: CRISPR Therapeutics AG
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: Original thesis was UNDERDONE (sector rally + routine governance 8-K). New flag re-classifies same name as OVERDONE on the basis of the -8.97% single-day move during XBI risk-off (-3.6%), arguing the magnitude is 3x beta for a clinical-stage name. The re-flag creates a direct thesis conflict: if the 8-K items are truly annual-meeting boilerplate (5.02 board election, 5.03 charter amendments, 5.07 vote results), the original UNDERDONE thesis still applies and the new downgrade is noise. But if the items contain an unplanned executive departure or dilutive authorization, the original thesis was wrong and re-flagging is justified. After 4 days at -1.73%, no new catalyst has emerged to resolve this ambiguity. The re-flag at OVERDONE conf 3 explicitly argues the move is excessive — that is the opposite of my entry thesis. Rather than hold into horizon hoping the governance items turn out benign, I should exit and let the flag data arbitrate: if CRSP bounces hard tomorrow on confirmation that 5.02 is routine election results, I can re-enter at better levels. Current position is small (1.1% of equity) but the thesis conflict is material. Exit now, preserve capital, re-evaluate on next catalyst clarity.

New flag today re-surfaces identical OVERDONE catalyst (Q1 earnings 8-K 5/28, continuation narrative) at conf 3, but five-day move has now extended to +27.47% on 2.24x volume while XLY sits negative—classic squeeze/positioning overlay on genuine beat. Holding zero BBY aligns with the higher-conviction fade thesis already in motion. (partial)

closed_positions.name: AeroVironment, Inc.
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: Entry thesis was OVERDONE (conf 3, weeks horizon) on Iran missile headline + defense sector bid. Position is -4.56% unrealized after 3 days. New flag today re-confirms OVERDONE conf 3 with identical catalyst, but now the five-day move is 30.83% on 3.28x volume, with no company-specific 8-K or contract award. The thesis has NOT evolved—it's the same geopolitical headline bid. If the setup was OVERDONE three days ago at a 10-15% run, it is definitively OVERDONE now at 30%+ on no new catalyst. Historical precedent in defense mid-caps is a 30-50% retrace within two weeks absent a contract award. Thesis is broken because the move has overextended past the point where geopolitical upside can justify hold. EXIT fully and avoid the retrace.

closed_positions.name: Best Buy Co., Inc.

closed_positions.name: Advanced Energy Industries
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: Re-evaluation required: original entry was OVERDONE conf 3 on 8-K surprise, closed 4 days ago at -6.48% realized loss. New flag re-lists AEIS as OVERDONE conf 3 with 1.01/2.03/3.02 financing signature and sector beta narrative. However, I explicitly exited this position 4 days ago because thesis was killed: the move was pure semicap-sector beta (1.6x SMH), not idiosyncratic catalyst, and conviction was gone. The new flag argues financing terms (convert premium, use of proceeds) could be priced in—plausible, but it is the SAME 8-K event I already saw on exit day (timestamp 5/13), and the re-entry bar is NOT met: confidence is still 3 (re-entry requires ≥4), and there is NO genuinely new information (the 8-K itself was the prior-exit catalyst; flag just re-describes it with added thesis flavor about financing terms). Thesis was killed by sector beta; flag does not supply new information to resurrect it. Exit to stop further drift and redeploy cash.

closed_positions.name: Extreme Networks
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: Entered on thesis that EXTR was experiencing sympathy selling off CALX's -14% print—a short-term dislocations trade with 'days' horizon. 8 days in, EXTR has recovered +19% while XLK remains elevated, indicating the read-through trade has normalized and the catalyst (CALX weakness dragging peers) has exhausted its effect. Holding further exposes the portfolio to reversal risk without a fresh catalyst. The original high-confidence short-term mismatch has been arbitraged away. No evidence of broader enterprise IT weakness that would sustain further upside. Exit captures the gain and redeploys capital toward fresh opportunities.
